operations.label: anon_query

errors.message: Anonymous access denied or access token has expired or is invalid.

assertions.raw: [ERRORS label=anon_query] errors[] non-empty — anonymous request rejected with Unauthorized extension code (BL-GQL-004)
assertions.label: anon_query

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] errors[0].extensions.code = "Unauthorized" — hard auth-gate (BL-GQL-004) — verify in evidence JSON
crossLayerChecks.note: errors[0].extensions.code = "Unauthorized" — hard auth-gate (BL-GQL-004) — verify in evidence JSON
crossLayerChecks.resolved: errors[0].extensions.code = "Unauthorized" — hard auth-gate (BL-GQL-004) — verify in evidence JSON

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] errors[0].path includes "promotionCoupons" — error scoped to the gated resolver
crossLayerChecks.note: errors[0].path includes "promotionCoupons" — error scoped to the gated resolver
crossLayerChecks.resolved: errors[0].path includes "promotionCoupons" — error scoped to the gated resolver

crossLayerChecks.raw: [EVIDENCE] No stack traces, file paths, SQL fragments, internal user ids, or coupon data in any error message (BL-AUTH-005) — verify in evidence JSON
crossLayerChecks.note: No stack traces, file paths, SQL fragments, internal user ids, or coupon data in any error message (BL-AUTH-005) — verify in evidence JSON
crossLayerChecks.resolved: No stack traces, file paths, SQL fragments, internal user ids, or coupon data in any error message (BL-AUTH-005) — verify in evidence JSON
